overview: Smileup is a premium social media platform on the Internet Computer featuring a global feed, ShortSport vertical video reels, advanced CapCut-style video editing, real-time messaging, trending creator rankings, channel pages, hashtag search, and a luxury dark UI with gold accents.
features: ShortSport vertical video feed (9:16) with swipe navigation
Home feed with 16:9 video players and thumbnail previews
Hashtag system with #tag extraction and search
Like, comment, share, follow, and fullscreen on every video
Advanced CapCut-style video editor with 50+ transitions
Channel/profile pages with uploadable banners and photos
Global visibility — all content visible to every visitor
Two additional Motoko canisters for expanded data capacity
